summaryBlock.title: Emotional Summary
summaryBlock.copyTemplate: Your echoes leaned {{valenceLabel}} and {{energyLabel}}, led by {{dominantEmotion}}{{secondaryEmotionClause}}.

identityDriftBlock.title: Identity Drift
identityDriftBlock.copyTemplate: This period showed {{direction}} {{emotion}} than before. Treat this as a seasonal drift, not a fixed identity.

silenceBlock.title: Quiet Spaces
silenceBlock.copyTemplate: There were quieter spaces in the record. EchoVault should lower confidence and avoid over-reading what was not written.
